title: Expand Date Column on My Work Page
excerpt: The Date column on the My Work page only shows part of the date if the task spans multiple days.  It’s extra steps for our users to open each item to see the dates.  It would be amazing if we could simply expand the colu…

posts.author: sshevchenko (Schelene Shevchenko)
posts.cookedHtml: The Date column on the My Work page only shows part of the date if the task spans multiple days. It’s extra steps for our users to open each item to see the dates. It would be amazing if we could simply expand the column if needed.
